adminAnalyticsForecast.heading: Platform Analytics
adminAnalyticsForecast.subtitle: 6-month demand and revenue forecasts.
adminAnalyticsForecast.demandSubtitle: Projected booking volume over the next 6 months with seasonal adjustment.
adminAnalyticsForecast.revenueSubtitle: Projected captured revenue with seasonal patterns accounted for.
adminAnalyticsForecast.seasonalityDescription: Demand and revenue patterns detect 12-month seasonality cycles. Peaks typically align with wedding seasons (Dec–Jan, May–Jun).
adminAnalyticsForecast.trendDescription: A moving average of recent months sets the baseline level; the 6-month projection applies seasonal indices to that level.
adminAnalyticsForecast.updateFrequencyDescription: Forecasts refresh as new booking and payment data arrives. Monthly review recommended for strategic planning.
adminAnalyticsForecast.errorLoading: Unable to load forecast data. Admin or Support role required, and at least one month of platform history.
adminAnalyticsForecast.noDataHint: Historical data will appear once records are available.

adminRetention.heading: Churn Recovery
adminRetention.subtitle: At-risk users the daily sweep flagged, and what happened after outreach.
adminRetention.noAttempts: No recovery attempts yet. The daily sweep records them here as it runs.
